text.title: python-modern-2026 Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for python-modern-2026 as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: t"..." template strings exist only in Python 3.14+. Agents grab the syntax from the README and paste into 3.12 code.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Runtime SyntaxError when 3.14 syntax hits 3.12 parser.

failure-mode.description: PEP 695 type Vec[T] = list[T] requires 3.12+. Mixing with from typing import TypeAlias is fine but redundant.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents conflate old and new syntax, producing unnecessary imports.

failure-mode.description: uv python install 3.13t is the free-threaded build — not the same as 3.13. Agents conflate them.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Installing the wrong build breaks the entire experiment.

failure-mode.description: uv run invokes the project's venv automatically — no source .venv/bin/activate. Agents that activate manually break uv's cache logic.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Manual activation bypasses uv's environment management.

failure-mode.description: uv sync removes packages not in pyproject.toml — surprise for agents who pip install ad-hoc.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents should use uv add or uv run --with, not pip install.

failure-mode.description: ruff format does NOT obey Black exactly — small differences (string quotes, trailing commas in some edges). Pin ruff version per repo.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening

failure-mode.description: mypy_django_plugin requires settings module — pyright doesn't, so agents flipping checkers see different error counts.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Type checkers have different plugin ecosystems.

failure-mode.description: pyproject.toml [tool.uv] block controls uv-specific options (index URLs, dev deps groups). Agents miss it and put dev deps in [project.optional-dependencies] only.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening

failure-mode.description: Hatchling [tool.hatch.build.targets.wheel] packages must match src layout. Mismatch produces empty wheel, no ImportError until install.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Build config must match project layout exactly.

failure-mode.description: Free-threaded benchmarks lie for I/O-bound code. README's table is honest but agents quote 3.3x speedup for code that won't see it.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening

failure-mode.description: f"{path.replace('\\', '/')}" (PEP 701) only works in 3.12+. Older Python errors at parse time, not runtime.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening

failure-mode.description: asyncio_mode = "auto" in pytest config means every async def test_ runs without @pytest.mark.asyncio — agents removing the marker on 3.11+ projects without auto mode break tests silently.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: pytest mode must match marker usage.
